runTitle: v8.11.95 Vercel Playwright MCP Broad Recheck
coveredSurfaces: Vercel production /api/version returned 8.11.95, commit b4ea434c0d402f2542b9891e98c193fac96902a1, tag v8.11.95, pipeline 2497070918
Vercel production /api/health returned healthy with database/cache/ai connected
Cloud Run direct /health returned ai-engine version 8.11.95 with provider configs ready
Landing page / rendered in Playwright with guest user shell
Dashboard /dashboard rendered in Playwright with navigation, session timer, and guest user shell
Dashboard routes /dashboard/servers, /dashboard/alerts, /dashboard/logs, and /dashboard/topology rendered without application error text
Fullscreen /dashboard/ai-assistant loaded on Vercel production with System Context, Provider Routing, AI Engine Online, and Production environment
Manual Health Check button executed and returned to ready state as 재확인
Playwright MCP submitted CPU top-3 prompt through the visible AI Chat input
CPU top-3 response used /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 and returned grounded server IDs and current CPU values: db-mysql-dc1-primary CPU 44%, db-mysql-dc1-replica CPU 43%, api-was-dc1-01 CPU 39%
CPU top-3 response preserved tool evidence with getServerMetricsAdvanced and did not contain the previous false answer '서버는 없습니다'
Formatting-only rewrite prompt stayed on /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 and rendered as general chat response
Formatting-only rewrite did not call /api/ai/jobs and did not show Reporter pipeline, artifact, anomaly/trend, or job queue text
Assistant persisted metadata included routeDecision executionPath=stream, mode=single, decidedBy=cloud-run, and featureStatus rag/web/thinking disabled
Reporter Agent tab rendered empty-state report UI with 새 보고서 and 첫 보고서 생성하기 controls; report generation was intentionally not clicked
Analyst tab rendered server selector and 전체 분석 control
Analyst 전체 분석 executed via /api/ai/intelligent-monitoring 200 and displayed 18-server result with one memory warning on cache-redis-dc1-01
Playwright console warnings/errors were 0
Vercel usage remained billed 0.0000 USD after QA
Cloud Run free-tier guardrail script passed all checks
skippedSurfaces: Reporter report generation was not clicked because it is a costlier async artifact/job path and was not needed for this recheck
Mobile viewport, auth edge cases, and destructive/log-export operations were outside this Vercel recheck

aiLatencyObservations.source: Playwright MCP visible response footer + persisted metadata
Playwright MCP visible response footer + persisted metadata

expertAssessments.rationale: The AI assistant executed the ranking and rewrite flows correctly through the production stream path, but the rewrite answer still follows a terse template rather than a polished operational-report style.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Tighten the formatting-only rewrite instruction or deterministic postprocessor so '2문장 운영 보고서용' consistently returns two polished sentences.

expertAssessments.rationale: Dashboard data surfaces render and Analyst detects the current memory warning, but the logs data-range label can show a confusing start/end date order for wrapped synthetic 24h data.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Normalize the logs 24h range label so the displayed start/end order is chronological or explicitly marked as a rolling synthetic window.

expertAssessments.rationale: Vercel, /api/health, Cloud Run /health, usage checks, and free-tier guardrails were healthy after the browser QA.

Playwright MCP covered rendered UI, visible input submission, network inspection, console checks, and screenshot evidence; plannerShadow latency metadata still rounds to 0 in production for fast shadow work.
expertAssessments.nextAction: Consider higher precision or explicit sub-millisecond representation for plannerShadow.latencyMs if it will be used as a rollout gate.

expertAssessments.rationale: CPU ranking and Analyst warning output used current synthetic monitoring data and preserved concrete server IDs and values.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period checked after Vercel Playwright MCP QA; effective 2.0188 USD, billed remains 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 1827.
Free-tier guardrails intact: maxScale=1, concurrency=16, timeout=300, cpu=1, memory=512Mi, cpu-throttling=true, latestReadyRevision=ai-engine-00410-8j9.

artifacts.label: v8.11.95 Vercel Playwright MCP AI assistant recheck

completedImprovements.title: AI ranking and formatting rewrite production routes remain stable on v8.11.95
completedImprovements.evidence: CPU ranking and formatting rewrite both returned through /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 without false job/artifact escalation.

completedImprovements.title: Dashboard core routes and AI assistant tabs render in Vercel production
completedImprovements.evidence: Playwright rendered /dashboard, servers, alerts, logs, topology, Reporter tab, and Analyst tab without application errors.

wontFixImprovements.title: plannerShadow latency metadata still records 0ms for fast production shadow decisions
wontFixImprovements.overengineeringScope: Telemetry precision only; user-facing AI response path, route choice, and latency footer are functioning.
wontFixImprovements.evidence: Persisted assistant metadata showed plannerShadow.latencyMs=0 for the CPU ranking and formatting rewrite requests while visible response latency was 1163ms/1499ms.
wontFixImprovements.note: The source measures after shadow construction, but Date.now() millisecond granularity can still round sub-ms planner work to 0.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

wontFixImprovements.title: Logs 24h data-range label can display a confusing non-chronological date order
wontFixImprovements.overengineeringScope: Display-label normalization only; logs page rendering, filters, and counts remain usable.
wontFixImprovements.evidence: Playwright logs page text included '데이터 범위: 2026.05.04 00:00:00 ~ 2026.05.03 23:50:00' during a 2026.05.04 16:10 KST session.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

wontFixImprovements.title: Formatting-only rewrite works but can return a terse two-line summary instead of polished report prose
wontFixImprovements.overengineeringScope: Answer style quality only; routing correctly avoids Reporter/job/artifact escalation.
wontFixImprovements.evidence: The rewrite answer stayed on chat stream and produced the correct values, but the second sentence was a terse '조치:' list rather than a natural operations report sentence.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

notes: This recheck broadened the previous v8.11.95 AI routing QA to include landing, dashboard shell, core dashboard routes, Reporter tab rendering, Analyst execution, console checks, Vercel usage, and Cloud Run free-tier guardrails.
The run did not create a Reporter report artifact because the user asked for Vercel Playwright QA and the regression concern was false escalation into Reporter/job paths.
No GitHub public snapshot sync was performed.
